entries.english: I go / I am going
you go / you are going
he goes / he is going
she goes / she is going
you go / you are going (formal)
we go / we are going
they go / they are going
you all go / you all are going

you went

I am going home now.
Are you going to school today?
My mom is going to the supermarket.

entries.spanish: Mi papá va al trabajo en carro.
entries.english: My dad goes to work by car.

entries.spanish: Nosotros vamos a la iglesia los domingos.
entries.english: We go to church on Sundays.

entries.spanish: Los niños van a la escuela en autobús.
entries.english: The children go to school by bus.
Are you all going to the office tomorrow?
I am going to the airport this afternoon.
We are going on vacation to Mexico.

entries.spanish: Mi perro va al veterinario hoy.
entries.english: My dog is going to the vet today.
Are you going to the pharmacy?

entries.spanish: Mi abuela va al médico esta semana.
entries.english: My grandmother is going to the doctor this week.

entries.spanish: Vamos a un restaurante esta noche.
entries.english: We are going to a restaurant tonight.

entries.spanish: Ellos van al parque los sábados.
entries.english: They go to the park on Saturdays.
Are you going to the gym today?

entries.spanish: Mi hermana va a la universidad el próximo año.
entries.english: My sister is going to college next year.
We are going to the service this morning.
Are your parents going on a trip?

entries.spanish: Fui a Colombia el año pasado.
entries.english: I went to Colombia last year.
Did you go to the office yesterday?

entries.spanish: Mi familia fue a un restaurante anoche.
entries.english: My family went to a restaurant last night.

entries.spanish: Fuimos a la iglesia el domingo pasado.
entries.english: We went to church last Sunday.

entries.spanish: Los niños fueron a casa después de la escuela.
entries.english: The children went home after school.
Where did you all go on vacation?

entries.spanish: Mi perro fue al veterinario la semana pasada.
entries.english: My dog went to the vet last week.

entries.spanish: Fui a la escuela a pie esta mañana.
entries.english: I went to school on foot this morning.

entries.spanish: Mi abuelo fue al hospital ayer.
entries.english: My grandfather went to the hospital yesterday.

entries.spanish: Fuimos al parque el sábado pasado.
entries.english: We went to the park last Saturday.
Where did your mom go yesterday?

entries.spanish: Ellos fueron al gimnasio esta mañana.
entries.english: They went to the gym this morning.

entries.spanish: Iré a México el próximo verano.
entries.english: I will go to Mexico next summer.
Will you go to church this Sunday?

entries.spanish: Mi gato irá al veterinario mañana.
entries.english: My cat will go to the vet tomorrow.

entries.spanish: Iremos a un restaurante para el cumpleaños de mi mamá.
entries.english: We will go to a restaurant for my mom's birthday.

entries.spanish: Los niños irán a casa a las tres.
entries.english: The children will go home at three.

entries.spanish: ¿Irás a la universidad el próximo año?
entries.english: Will you go to college next year?

entries.spanish: Mi mamá irá al médico mañana.
entries.english: My mom will go to the doctor tomorrow.

entries.spanish: ¿Irán ustedes a la oficina el lunes?
entries.english: Will you all go to the office on Monday?

entries.spanish: Iremos a visitar a mis abuelos en Navidad.
entries.english: We will go visit my grandparents at Christmas.
Where will you go on vacation this year?

entries.spanish: Iré a la reunión a las dos.
entries.english: I will go to the meeting at two.

entries.spanish: Iremos al parque si no llueve.
entries.english: We will go to the park if it doesn't rain.
